questionHtml:
What is a universal characteristic of the genetic code?

A. There are more than 64 different anticodons.

B. There are more nucleotides than codons.

C. There are more codons than amino acids.

D. There are two or more amino acids for each codon.

meta.title: What is a universal characteristic of the genetic code? A. There are more than 64 different anticodons. B. There are more nucleotides than codons. C. There are more codons than ami
breadcrumbLabels: D1.2.8. Features of the genetic code
